messages.message.makeTravelMoreRewarding: Make travel more rewarding with World of Hyatt.
messages.message.invalidEmailFormat: Please enter a valid email address.
messages.message.rateCalendarMessages.loadError: We're having trouble loading the Points Calendar for {hotelName}.
messages.message.rateCalendarMessages.roomUnavail: Room Choice Not Available for Check-in
messages.message.wohEnrollStepOne: Join in minutes to save up to 10%. You’ll get members-only offers and earn rewards by enjoying restaurants, spas, and unique experiences.
messages.message.rateCalendarMessages.disclaimerP: Points will be deducted from your account when the reservation is confirmed.
messages.message.rateCalendarMessages.chooseLengt: Begin by choosing a length of stay. Explore different stay lengths for additional availability.
messages.message.noAvailabilityWithSuggestion: Not available. Try updating dates or details.
messages.message.rateCalendarMessages.toSeePoints: to see your current points total
messages.message.noResultsHeader: There are no Hyatt hotels that match your search.
messages.message.noResultsInstructions: Please modify your search and try again.
messages.label.aria.dreamMapViewToggle: Map view. (Releasing redirects to list page view)
messages.message.toUsePointsAtAParticipatingMrMrs: To use points at a participating Mr & Mrs Smith hotel, choose a hotel and dates and select "Use Points"
messages.message.errorOccured: Looks like an error occurred while your request was being processed.
messages.message.openNewWindow: Opens in new tab or window.
messages.pagedescription.exploreHotels: Explore Hyatt’s map to find hotels and resorts. Refine options by amenities, categories or brands
messages.heading.brands.ziva.subheadline: The family friendly all-inclusive resort where guests of all ages can delight in fun.
messages.heading.brands.zilara.subheadline: The adults only all-inclusive resort with endless opportunities to live in the moment.
messages.copy.offlineForMaintenance: The World of Hyatt account system is offline for maintenance. We will be back shortly.
messages.copy.callReservationCenter: For immediate support, please contact a reservation center.
messages.list.countries.GB: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
messages.list.countries.GS: South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
messages.list.countries.SH: Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
messages.label.bedType.suite: One or more bedrooms connected to lounge area.
messages.label.bedType.specialitySuite: View our collections of truly distinctive suites. Some require calling our hotel to reserve.
messages.label.bedType.residence: One or more bedrooms with large living space and/or kitchen.
messages.label.bedType.theReserve: Featuring a dedicated entrance, private check-in, 24-hour butler service and VIP lounge access.
messages.label.bookWithPointsPrompt: Would you like to book these dates with points?
messages.label.exclusiveAccessCourtesyCard: Enjoy exclusive access with Courtesy Card
messages.message.awardNightRedemptionBenefit: Award night redemption more than 12 months in advance is a benefit for Explorists, Globalists and World of Hyatt Cardmembers. Check back in when you reach this status—and start enjoying exclusive access.
messages.message.awardNightRedemptionBenefitUnloc: Award night redemption more than 12 months in advance is a benefit for Explorists, Globalists and World of Hyatt Cardmembers. You can unlock access with a World of Hyatt Credit Card.
messages.message.awardNightRedemptionSignIn: Explorists, Globalists and World of Hyatt Cardmembers can redeem award nights more than 12 months in advance. Sign in to view availability.
messages.message.awardNightRedemptionSignInUnlock: Sign in to redeem award nights more than 12 months in advance, a benefit for Explorists, Globalists and World of Hyatt Cardmembers. You can unlock access with a World of Hyatt Credit Card.
messages.message.earlyAccessCardmember: As a World of Hyatt Cardmember, you're among select members who get a first look at award night inventory. You can view and book award nights one month sooner.
messages.message.exclusiveAccessCourtesyCard: As part of your Courtesy Card benefits, you're among select members who get a first look at award night inventory. You can view and book award nights one month sooner.
messages.message.exclusiveAccessExplorist: As an Explorist, you're among select members who get a first look at award night inventory. You can view and book award nights one month sooner.
messages.message.exclusiveAccessGlobalist: As a Globalist, you're among select members who get a first look at award night inventory. You can view and book award nights one month sooner.
messages.message.exclusiveAccessLifetimeGlobalist: As a Lifetime Globalist, you're among select members who get a first look at award night inventory. You can view and book award nights one month sooner.
messages.message.datesError.invalidFormat: Please check your dates and format them as (MMM/DD/YYYY).
messages.message.datesError.tooFarAway: We're sorry. Only dates up to 24 months from today can be searched.
messages.message.datesError.beforeToday: The date you selected is in the past. Please select a valid date.
messages.message.notAcceptingPointsAwards: This hotel is not accepting World of Hyatt point reservations during these dates; please modify your search.
messages.message.roomQuantityLimit: World of Hyatt points and awards can be redeemed one room at a time. To book another room, please make a separate reservation.
messages.message.roomQuantityLimitForSLH: Small Luxury Hotels of the World can only be booked one room at a time. To book another room, please make a separate reservation.
messages.message.WoHPanelOopsDuplicateEmail: Oops! It looks like there is already an account associated with that email address.
messages.message.WoHPanelCannotComplete: We're sorry. We were unable to complete your enrollment.
messages.message.rateNames.eventSpaceFoodAndBever: Event Space and Food & Beverage Summary
messages.message.rateNames.eventSpaceTaxAndServic: Event Space Tax and Service Charge
messages.message.rateNames.serviceChargeDisclaime: Includes {serviceCharge}% service charge distributed to staff
messages.message.rateMessages.redeemPoints: Plans might change? Cancel up to two days prior to check-in to avoid a one night fee.
messages.message.rateMessages.pointsCash: Cancel up to two days prior to check-in to avoid 1 night fee.
messages.message.rateMessages.wohPrepay: Exclusively for members: prepay before your stay. Nonrefundable, no changes.
messages.message.rateMessages.wohFlexible: Exclusively for members: flexible cancellation; pay at hotel checkout.
messages.message.rateMessages.wohFlexibleWithDepo: Exclusively for members: flexible cancellation; deposit required.
messages.message.rateMessages.wohDoublePoints: Earn twice the points and enjoy free nights sooner.
messages.message.rateMessages.wohGuaranteedAvaila: Exclusively for elite members: ensures room availability when hotel is sold out.
messages.message.rateMessages.prepay: Save more when you prepay before your stay. Non-refundable. No changes.
messages.message.rateMessages.finalizedAfterEvent: Rate will be finalized after Event Setup
messages.message.rateMessages.flexible: Flexible cancellation: pay at hotel checkout.
messages.message.rateMessages.paymentHotelCurrenc: Changes in booking details will affect the total price. Your payment will be processed in the hotel’s currency ({currencyCode}). Foreign transaction fees may apply.
messages.message.rateMessages.paymentNotification: Listed prices are subject to change in the event of a change in booking details. Your payment will be processed in your local currency ({currencyCode}). Foreign transaction fees may apply.
Changes in booking details will affect the total price.
messages.message.rateMessages.paymentNoticeHeadLi: Total charges are subject to change
messages.message.rateMessages.promotion: Save more and take the vacation of your dreams. Non-refundable, no changes.
messages.message.rateMessages.priceToBeFinalizedW: Price to be finalized with hotel.
messages.message.rateMessages.continueOrBack: Continue with a refreshed room rate or go back to search results.
messages.message.rateMessages.resortCredit: Receive a $100 resort credit to spend at Hyatt outlets during your stay.
messages.message.rateMessages.redeemPointsInStand: Redeem your points for a free night in a standard room.
messages.message.rateMessages.redeemPointsInClubR: Redeem your points for a free night in a club room.
messages.message.rateMessages.roomAvailability: Room availability is subject to change.
messages.message.rateMessages.pointsCashInStandar: Combine your points + cash for a free night in a standard room.
messages.message.rateMessages.cashPoints: Redeem your points for a guaranteed upgrade to a club room.
messages.message.rateMessages.award: Use an award for a free night in a standard room.
messages.message.rateMessages.senior: Let us care for you so you can be your best — for guests 62 and older.
messages.message.rateMessages.government: Active government or military identification is required at time of check-in.
messages.message.rateMessages.aaa: Exclusive for AAA/CAA Members. Just present your membership card at check-in.
messages.message.rateMessages.veteran: Honoring U.S. veterans, service members, and immediate family members.
messages.message.rateMessages.offerCode: The special offer code, {code}, has been applied.
messages.message.rateMessages.groupCode: The corporate or group code, {code}, has been applied.
messages.message.rateMessages.theReserve: A dedicated entrance, private check-in and 24-hour butler service are among the exclusive amenities.
messages.message.rateMessages.thirdNightFree: Extend your stay with a complimentary night. Receive every 3rd consecutive night free. Prepayment is required and non-refundable.
messages.message.rateMessages.offers.stay: Extend your stay with a complimentary night. Prepayment is required and non-refundable.
messages.message.rateMessages.offers.off: Save more when you prepay before your stay. Prepayment is non-refundable.
messages.message.rateMessages.offers.credit: Receive a {amount} hotel credit to spend during your stay. Prepayment is required and non-refundable.
messages.message.rateRedemptionMessages.wohPrepay: Just for Members - only on Hyatt.com!
messages.message.rateRedemptionMessages.wohFlexib: Just for Members - only on Hyatt.com!
Just for Members - only on Hyatt.com!
messages.message.rateRedemptionMessages.wohGuaran: Just for Members - only on Hyatt.com!
messages.message.rateCalendarMessages.availabilit: See how many points you'd need to redeem a free night award at this location. Note: calendar does not reflect actual award availability
messages.message.rateCalendarMessages.getStartedC: Get started with a check-in date and room information
messages.message.rateCalendarMessages.beginChecki: Begin by choosing stay details and check-in date
messages.message.rateCalendarMessages.disclaimer: Points will be deducted from your account when the reservation is confirmed. Cash values are {percent}% of the standard rate.
